headlines.title: China and U.S. agree Hormuz should not be ‘militarized,’ Marco Rubio says
headlines.description: President Donald Trump discussed the Iran war and the blockade of the Strait of Hormuz during a summit with President Xi Jinping, Secretary of State Marco Rubio told NBC News in an interview Thursday.

headlines.title: Republicans grapple with how much to have Trump on the campaign trail for the midterms
headlines.description: Trump’s approval rating is sinking amid high prices and the war with Iran, but he’s still the best at turning out the base voters Republicans need for the midterms.

headlines.title: Trump says U.S. and China share 'deep sense of mutual respect' at state banquet
headlines.description: President Donald Trump spoke at the Great Hall of the People in Beijing, praising China shortly after Chinese President Xi Jinping's address during the historic event.

headlines.title: Senate Confirms Kevin Warsh as Next Federal Reserve Chair
headlines.description: The Senate has confirmed President Donald Trump’s nominee Kevin Warsh to lead the Federal Reserve. The vote fell mostly along party lines. Warsh will replace Jerome Powell as chair of the world’s most powerful central bank. Powell plans to remain on the Fed’s board even after his term as chair ends.

headlines.title: Americans Voice New Frustrations Over Inflation, Consumer Prices
headlines.description: As President Donald Trump attends the high-stakes summit between the United States and China, the political fallout from rising prices for Americans is growing with the war in Iran restricting the world’s oil supply and sending gas prices skyrocketing. New data revealed that businesses' costs had their highest monthly surge in more than four years and the cost of groceries rising too. It comes as Republicans are defending President Donald Trump’s comments saying Americans’ finances are not

headlines.title: The war is on hold, but Iran’s internal crackdown is only deepening
headlines.description: While the Iranian regime has been battling its external enemies, Israel and the U.S., it has also been ramping up a deadly crackdown on those seen as the enemy within.

headlines.title: The cage match is on for tickets to Trump’s UFC fight at the White House
headlines.description: 4,000-plus spectators who are lucky enough, cunning enough or rich enough will score a seat to the UFC fight on the South Lawn next month.

headlines.title: How the White House Correspondents’ Association dinner chaos unfolded
headlines.description: Secret Service faced challenges evacuating President, Vice President, Cabinet officials and Congressional leaders after gunman rushes D.C. gala.

headlines.title: Xi warns Trump of possible conflict over Taiwan at grand Beijing summit
headlines.description: BEIJING — Chinese President Xi Jinping warned Thursday of “clashes and even conflicts” with the United States over Taiwan, cautioning President Donald Trump that tensions over the Beijing-claimed island could jeopardize ties between the world’s two biggest economies

headlines.title: Map: How much you pay in federal and state gas taxes
headlines.description: As national gas price averages head toward $5 per gallon, one state has already suspended its gas tax, and now President Donald Trump and his Cabinet are talking about doing the same.

headlines.title: Democratic grassroots group to target more than 60 races with canvassing effort
headlines.description: A Democratic grassroots organization seeking to conduct at least 500,000 substantive conversations with voters across the battleground map this year said it is expanding its list of targets to more than 60 contested congressional and state races.

headlines.title: Bill Cassidy’s vaccine advocacy puts his future in peril as he contends with MAHA
headlines.description: Sen. Bill Cassidy’s advocacy for vaccines and his résumé as a doctor have defined his political career
